channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Antioch brackish desalination plant set to begin operations
item.description: Antioch's brackish desalination plant will kickstart operations in the first quarter of 2025. It is expected to treat and convert 6 million gallons a day of brackish water.
item.dc:creator: Hema Sivanandam, The Mercury News

item.title: How to use Gemini AI to make templates in Google Sheets
item.description: Need ideas or motivation to help you build a spreadsheet in Google Sheets? You can browse through the templates that are included in this office app and select one to customize. But a more intriguing option is to use the tool in Sheets called Help Me Organize.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: TechRadar's Year in Review 2024 – from tri-fold phones and super-smart rings to AI everywhere
item.description: It's been quite the year for tech! Here's our round up of the biggest trends in phones, computing, TVs, gaming, cameras, streaming and more in 2024.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Venezuela's top court issues a $10 million fine for TikTok over allegedly deadly video challenges
item.description: CARACAS, Venezuela (AP) — Venezuela’s Supreme Court on Monday issued a $10 million fine against TikTok for “not implementing measures” to prevent viral video challenges that have allegedly led to the deaths of three Venezuelan children recently.
item.dc:creator: JUAN PABLO ARRAEZ and MANUEL RUEDA, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Small businesses brace themselves for potentially disruptive TikTok ban
item.description: A looming TikTok ban could affect the millions of small businesses that use the short-video social media app to grow their business.
item.dc:creator: Mae Anderson, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Zagg warns customers their data may have been stolen in third-party cyberattack
item.description: A third-party company used indirectly by Zagg has resulted in sensitive customer information being exposed.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Multitenant data management with TiDB
item.description: In a previous article, we explored various approaches to managing data for multitenant applications. We examined the benefits, compromises and limitations of different deployment models, including share-nothing, share-everything, and hybrid.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: 2024: un año reseñable de avances para la salud digital en España
item.description: A lo largo de 2024 se han logrado avances muy significativos en Tecnologías de la Información y comunicaciones (TIC) para la salud en España.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Elon Musk causes uproar by backing Germany’s far-right party AfD
item.description: The Tesla Motors CEO also wrote that his investment in Germany gave him the right to comment on the country’s condition.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Stuck behind a VPN wall? Let’s find a way around it
item.description: A virtual private network (VPN) allows computer and smartphone users to mask an IP and create a secure, encrypted connection between a device and the internet.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump asks Supreme Court to delay TikTok ban so he can weigh in after he takes office
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump has asked the Supreme Court to pause the potential TikTok ban from going into effect until his administration can pursue a “political resolution” to the issue.
item.dc:creator: Haleluya Hadero, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Maintaining compliance in government agencies with rich text editors
item.description: Learn how rich text editors help government agencies ensure compliance with data security, accessibility, and document standardization. The post Maintaining compliance in government agencies with rich text editors first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: New York state government to monitor its use of AI under a new law
item.description: ALBANY, N.Y. (AP) — New York state government agencies will have to conduct reviews and publish reports that detail how they're using artificial intelligence software, under a new law signed by Gov. Kathy Hochul.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: The second shoe is about to drop on a big DoD cybersecurity program
item.description: The DoD's big cybersecurity program advanced earlier this month. It's a big rule to carry out if it becomes effective. The post The second shoe is about to drop on a big DoD cybersecurity program first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: A 9th telecoms firm has been hit by a massive Chinese espionage campaign, the White House says
item.description: A top White House official says a ninth U.S. telecoms firm has been confirmed to have been hacked as part of a sprawling Chinese espionage campaign that gave officials in Beijing access to private texts and phone conversations of an unknown number of Americans.
item.dc:creator: Eric Tucker, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Mexico tests cellphone app allowing migrants to send alert if they are about to be detained in US
item.description: MEXICO CITY (AP) — Mexico is developing a cellphone app that will allow migrants to warn relatives and local consulates if they think they are about to be detained by the U.S. immigration department, a senior official said Friday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Delivering efficiencies through automated software testing
item.description: Learn how innovative testing strategies can empower your team to deliver faster, better and more reliable software. The post Delivering efficiencies through automated software testing first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: Undersea power cable linking Finland and Estonia hit by outage, prompting investigation
item.description: FRANKFURT, Germany (AP) — A power cable linking Finland and Estonia under the Baltic Sea suffered an outage, prompting an investigation, Finnish Prime Minister Petteri Orpo said Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: How iOS 18.2 now lets you share your AirTag's location with anyone
item.description: iOS 18.2 lets AirTag owners securely share item locations with trusted individuals. Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson examines the powerful new feature.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: What is serverless? Serverless computing explained
item.description: Over the past two decades, considerable innovation has gone into making sure developers don’t have to think much about the underlying physical machine their code runs on. Serverless computing is a paradigm that takes this objective to its logical conclusion.
item.dc:creator: Info World
